commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=0e71d80cd304721087ae2cd0fa957977b5d44e89)
commands.review_summary:
The PR wires MCP transport close/error callbacks into session MCP runtime eviction and adds a regression test that kills a probe MCP server process.

Reproducibility: yes. by source inspection: current main returns the cached runtime when fingerprint and workspace match, then callTool uses the cached client after the SDK close path clears _transport, so later requests reject with Not connected. I did not run the integration test because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: Needs contributor real behavior proof and branch updates; ClawSweeper repair should not be queued while the external proof gate is unsatisfied.

target.title: fix(mcp): evict cached session runtime when transport closes unexpectedly
target.author: klin3867
